basic_details.job_title: Central University of Rajasthan Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Rajasthan (CURAJ) Research Associate (RA) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CURAJ Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Ph.D. in Microbiology/Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Life Sciences with research experience in Industrial Microbiology/Biotechnology; Hands-on experience in Microalgae culturing, HPLC, fermentative biomass, biocatalysis, molecular biology, biochemistry

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Research Associate (RA) post at the Central University of Rajasthan is 10th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Microbiology, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, or Life Sciences, along with relevant research experience in industrial microbiology, biotechnology, or bioprocess development.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Associate (RA) position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 58,000 per month, plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their merit, followed by an interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Which university is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Central University of Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Research Associate (RA) recruitment is BT/PR58951/CCU/173/19/2025.

faq.question: Q9. What specific experience is preferred for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Preferred experience includes hands-on work in microalgae culturing, HPLC, fermentative biomass in microalgae, biocatalysis, molecular biology, and biochemistry.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the application link (email) can be found in the 'Important Links' section of this article. The official website is also provided for further information.
